name: recall_fact
description: Retrieve a fact from your holographic memory by query. Fuzzy-matches your query against stored keys. Returns the most likely match with a confidence score. Use this at the start of monitoring cycles to check what you already know before fetching fresh data.

query.description: Key or description of what you want to recall (e.g. 'dua breach', 'last checked', 'gap l06')

nugget.description: Optional: which memory store to search. Omit to search all stores.

session_id.description: Optional: session identifier for hit-tracking (used for promotion threshold)
